VAL-SYNC-001.reason: Sync status indicator visible in status bar with green badge showing 'Tersinkronkan' and 'Online' network indicator. Screenshots: VAL-SYNC-001_after_config.png, VAL-SYNC-001_dashboard_statusbar.png

VAL-SYNC-002.reason: Clicking the '1 pending' button in the status bar expanded the 'Status Sinkronisasi Per Modul' panel, showing Kas with 1 pending item and Bank/Gudang/COA/Aspek Kerja/Blok with synced checkmarks. Screenshot: VAL-SYNC-002_module_breakdown.png

VAL-SYNC-003.reason: Using 'agent-browser set offline on', a red offline banner 'Offline - Perubahan akan diqueue...' appeared at the top, and a yellow warning toast 'Koneksi terputus, perubahan akan diqueue' was displayed. Screenshot: VAL-SYNC-003_offline_banner.png

VAL-SYNC-004.reason: After configuring a valid sync path and triggering sync, green success toasts '1 koneksi berhasil' appeared in the top-right corner. The sync API returned success with message 'Sinkronisasi selesai: 1 berhasil, 0 konflik, 0 gagal'. Screenshot: VAL-SYNC-004_sync_completion.png

VAL-SYNC-005.reason: Could not verify a dedicated red sync-failure toast. Direct API failure bypassed the React toast system. While testing via the UI 'Sinkronisasi sekarang' button, the Electron app crashed and the CDP connection was lost. Yellow warning toasts for connection failures were observed in prior attempts.

VAL-SYNC-006.reason: Electron app crashed during VAL-SYNC-005 testing and the CDP connection to port 9222 was lost. The process is no longer running, preventing further UI testing.

VAL-SYNC-007.reason: Electron app crashed during VAL-SYNC-005 testing and the CDP connection to port 9222 was lost. The process is no longer running, preventing further UI testing.

VAL-SYNC-011.reason: Toggled offline using 'agent-browser set offline on' and then back online with 'agent-browser set offline off'. Observed status bar switching from 'Online/Tersinkronkan' to offline red banner and yellow warning toast, then back to online with info toast 'Koneksi dipulihkan, memulai sinkronisasi...'. Status updates and notifications fired correctly.

frictions: SyncStatusBar uses a red offline banner (bg-red-600) instead of the yellow banner specified in VAL-SYNC-003 assertion text
ToastContainer toasts can overlay interactive elements (e.g., 'Sinkronisasi sekarang' button), requiring JavaScript-based clicks to bypass hit-testing
Direct electronAPI.performSync bypasses React SyncContext notifications; UI-level sync triggers are needed to test toast behavior accurately
blockers: Electron app crashed during manual sync button test (VAL-SYNC-005), losing CDP connection on port 9222. Process no longer running. Assertions VAL-SYNC-005, VAL-SYNC-006, and VAL-SYNC-007 could not be fully verified via the UI.
